'''wafoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docks|docks]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docks|docks]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wafoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæfeketh|wæfeketh]] || [[word:wæfekej|wæfekej]] || [[word:wæfekesh|wæfekesh]] || [[word:wæfeke|wæfeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafofokoth|wafofokoth]] || [[word:wafofokoj|wafofokoj]] || [[word:wafofokosh|wafofokosh]] || [[word:wafofoko|wafofoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafokoth|wafokoth]] || [[word:wafokoj|wafokoj]] || [[word:wafokosh|wafokosh]] || [[word:wafoko|wafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafofkoth|wafofkoth]] || [[word:wafofkoj|wafofkoj]] || [[word:wafofkosh|wafofkosh]] || [[word:wafofkof|wafofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wafokotho|wafokotho]] || [[word:wafokojo|wafokojo]] || [[word:wafokosho|wafokosho]] || [[word:wafokoko|wafokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wafokoth|wafokoth]] || [[word:wafokoj|wafokoj]] || [[word:wafokosh|wafokosh]] || [[word:wafoko|wafoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wafokothol|wafokothol]] || [[word:wafokojol|wafokojol]] || [[word:wafokoshol|wafokoshol]] || [[word:wafokokol|wafokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wafokothotho|wafokothotho]] || [[word:wafokojojo|wafokojojo]] || [[word:wafokoshosho|wafokoshosho]] || [[word:wafokoko|wafokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wafokothon|wafokothon]] || [[word:wafokojon|wafokojon]] || [[word:wafokoshon|wafokoshon]] || [[word:wafokokon|wafokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wafokothoro|wafokothoro]] || [[word:wafokojoro|wafokojoro]] || [[word:wafokoshoro|wafokoshoro]] || [[word:wafokokoro|wafokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
